---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation

Why is this feature important? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How would you like this feature to work?

## Cardano Compatibility

- [ ] This feature exists in cardano-base/cardano-ledger
  - If yes, link to relevant code: _______________
- [ ] This is a CIP (Cardano Improvement Proposal)
  - If yes, CIP number: _______________
  - Link: _______________
- [ ] This is a new Rust-specific feature

## API Design

```rust
// Proposed API design (if applicable)
```

## Alternatives Considered

What alternative solutions or features have you considered?

## Additional Context

Any additional information, links to specifications, or examples.

## Implementation Complexity

- [ ] Simple (< 1 day)
- [ ] Medium (1-3 days)
- [ ] Complex (> 3 days)
- [ ] Unsure

## Breaking Changes

- [ ] This would require breaking API changes
- [ ] This is backward compatible

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues/PRs for similar requests
- [ ] I have linked to relevant CIPs or cardano-base code (if applicable)
- [ ] I have considered backward compatibility
